_README: Per-ticker archetype config consumed by finance_data.py for sanity-check threshold tuning.
cyclical_tech: memory chips, semis equipment, networking — peak/trough revenue swings 2-3x
cyclical_industrial: autos, chemicals, materials — slower 1.5-2x cycles
cyclical_normalized: handled at engine level (target_engine.py) for normalized-earnings DCF
secular_growth: software, fintech, secular-trend-only — no cycle assumed
compounder: stable margin business — minimal sequential variance expected
Tickers not listed get default thresholds.

INCIDENT 2026-05-09: MU misdiagnosis (calendar-vs-fiscal quarter trap + sanity check too tight for real cyclical ramps) led to architectural fix. MU = cyclical_tech (memory chips, HBM cycle, AI capex peak).
Future tickers: add as observed. The classifier in scripts/archetype_classifier.py (per project_archetype_system memory) can also infer; this file is for explicit operator overrides.
